text: I have not heard back yet.
She has just replied, and we have already signed.
Hi Marcos, it was great to meet you at the congress in Washington. Have you had time to look at my proposal?
Hello Rachel. Yes, I have just read it. Thank you for reaching out so quickly. I have a few questions.
Of course. Did you receive the attachment with the full report?
I have received your email, but I haven't opened the attachment yet. Could you forward it again?
Sure, I have already forwarded it. Please check your inbox and acknowledge it when it arrives.
Got it. I have prepared a short draft, so I will reply with my comments by Friday.
Perfect. I look forward to your reply. It has been a pleasure working with you.
Likewise, Rachel. I will be in touch very soon.
I have attached the report to this email.
Could you forward me the attachment?
I will reply by Friday. Sincerely, Marcos.

Hi Marcos, this is David from the Washington congress. I hope you are doing well. I am calling about the email I sent you on Monday. I have attached the updated valuation report and a short draft of our agreement. I have not heard back from you yet, so I just wanted to make sure you received it. The attachment is quite large, so please check that it did not go to your spam folder. If you have already read it, that is great. When you have a moment, please reply and let me know your thoughts. The deal is still pending on our side, but we are ready to move forward as soon as you confirm. Thanks again, and talk soon.

Good morning, Marcos. Here is your email summary for today. You have three messages that need a reply. First, Rachel from the congress has sent the final contract. She is waiting for you to acknowledge it. Second, the supplier has forwarded the new prices, but you have not opened that attachment yet. Third, a new contact named Karen would like to reach out about a future project. She has just added you on LinkedIn. Two replies are still pending from last week, so please follow up today. That is all for now. Have a productive morning.
She has just replied to my message.
I haven't opened the attachment yet.
We have already signed the contract.
Please attach the file to your reply.
I have attached the report to this email.
I am still waiting for your reply.
Could you forward me the attachment?
I have already acknowledged your email.
I have not heard back yet.
I will reply by Friday. Sincerely, Marcos.
